body_text:
Hi Sarah,

Thanks again for reaching out. Since this event is right around the corner, I wanted to keep this simple and give you a real ballpark so we can close this quickly if the direction feels right.

Based on what you asked for — mainly Brazilian appetizers, with some meat and rice — I built this with two appetizers at $2.50 per person and one appetizer at $3.50 per person, for a total appetizer add-on of $8.50 per person.

Option 1 - Full Churrasco
Food: $872.50
Appetizers: $212.50
MA Tax (7%): $75.95
Service, Fuel & Admin (24%): $260.40
Service Charge: $150.00
Ballpark Total: ~$1571.35

Option 2 - Deluxe Churrasco
Food: $997.50
Appetizers: $212.50
MA Tax (7%): $84.70
Service, Fuel & Admin (24%): $290.40
Service Charge: $150.00
Ballpark Total: ~$1735.10

If this feels close to what you want, the next move is simple: send the payment and I can help lock this in right away before the date gets any tighter.

Regards,
Andre Raw
Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website
